instructions: Ensure `verify_mirrorlist_connectivity.sh` uses aggressive timeout bounds (`--connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2`) for curl.
Review test scripts to eliminate redundant fork/exec overhead in loops.
Ensure the test output clearly distinguishes between a skipped test (due to environment) and a failed test.
Provide actionable '💡 How to fix:' instructions when tests fail.
Verify that mirror testing scripts securely parse the mirrorlist without executing its contents.
